summary: Download PoligonSoft Free and complete the installation process on your computer.
actions: Create an account or sign in on the PoligonSoft website.
Download the PoligonSoft Free installer from your User Profile page.
Follow the installation wizard until the process is complete.
expected: PoligonSoft Free will be installed on your computer. The icon used to launch PoligonSoft will appear on the desktop.
